APPEARANCE:
B. Gardiner McKlevoy, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Eisar Lipkovitz

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents (set #1).

Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections, other than based on the attorney client or attorney work product privileges, within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $380 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
